title: caltha sinogracilis
intro: Caltha sinogracilis, also known as the Chinese marsh marigold, is a perennial plant species native to China that belongs to the buttercup family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Caltha sinogracilis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
